passage.title: A Day with Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands
passage.text: He asked, "Are you coming?" He asked if I was coming. She asked, "Where do you live?" She asked where I lived. He said, "Do this work." He told me to do this work. She said, "Do not come here." She told me not to come here. They asked, "Are you ready?" They asked if I was ready.
passage.hindiTranslation: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?" उसने पूछा कि क्या मैं आ रहा था। उसने पूछा, "तुम कहाँ रहते हो?" उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था। उसने कहा, "यह काम करो।" उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा। उसने कहा, "यहाँ मत आओ।" उसने मुझे यहाँ न आने को कहा। उन्होंने पूछा, "क्या तुम तैयार हो?" उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He asked, "Are you..."?
options: She told me not to come here.
He asked if I was coming.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He asked, "Are you coming?""

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He asked if I..."?
options: She asked when I would come.
He asked if I was coming.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: He asked if I was coming.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He asked if I was coming."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She asked, "Where do..."?
options: They asked if I was ready.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She asked, "Where do you live?""

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She asked where I..."?
options: The doctor told me to take medicine.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She asked where I lived."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He said, "Do this..."?
options: He asked what I was doing.
He told me to do this work.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He said, "Do this work.""

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He told me to..."?
options: He asked if I needed help.
He told me to do this work.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: He told me to do this work.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He told me to do this work."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She said, "Do not..."?
options: The teacher told us to be quiet.
She told me not to come here.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She said, "Do not come here.""

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She told me not..."?
options: He asked if I was coming.
She told me not to come here.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She told me not to come here.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She told me not to come here."
